creator: jens.kassel@servicefactory.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #6)

I have not been able to test this patch yet. Our product still runs on FreeBSD 8.4 but it is in the plan to upgrade to FreeBSD 11. Once we do I will retest but I can not say at the moment when that will be. Probably later this year. If I remember correctly I was able to reproduce it with NAT enabled but you may be right that the problem is related to state. Seem to have lost the testcode I used. But it just sent 2 IP packets (2 fragments) containing a TCP segement and the last fragment was sent first.
